utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I just thought the two of us should hang out for a bit .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean , you know , we have never really talked .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I guess you would know that , being one of the two of us , though , right ?

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: I know , I probably should not even tell you this , but I am pretty much totally intimidated by you .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am pretty much totally intimidated by you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Really ? Me ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am pretty much totally intimidated by you .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Oh my god , are you kidding ?

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Ross is so crazy about you , and I really wanted you to like me , and , it is probably me being totally paranoid , but I kinda got the feeling that maybe you do not .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I really wanted you to like me , and , it is probably me being totally paranoid , but I kinda got the feeling that maybe you do not .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , you are not totally paranoid .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Oy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Um , ok , uh , oh god , um , when you and uh Ross first started going out , it was really hard for me , um , for many reasons , which I am not gonna bore you with now , but um ...

emotion_cause.span: 10_when you and uh Ross first started going out , it was really hard for me

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I just , I see how happy he is , you know , and how good you guys are together , and um , Monica always saying how nice you are , and god I hate it when she is right .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I see how happy he is , you know , and how good you guys are together , and um , Monica always saying how nice you are

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Thanks .

emotion_cause.span: 11_Monica always saying how nice you are , and god I hate it when she is right .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Hey , listen , would you like to go to a movie sometime or something ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_would you like to go to a movie sometime or something ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , that would be great . I would love it .

emotion_cause.span: 14_that would be great . I would love it .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: I would love it too .

emotion_cause.span: 14_Yeah , that would be great . I would love it .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Shoot , I gotta go . So , I will talk to you later .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right , Julie .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: Bye .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Bye .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What a manipulative bitch .
